H3.status_note: PASS on vanilla RHCOS 9.8+ (OCP 4.22+). Older RHCOS versions still require remediation.

M10.title: API Server Encryption
M10.notes: Platform-level APIServer config, not a MachineConfig.

M11.title: Ingress TLS Ciphers
M11.notes: Platform-level IngressController config, not a MachineConfig.

M12.title: Audit Profile
M12.notes: Platform-level APIServer audit profile, not a MachineConfig.

M27.title: SSHD Moderate Extensions
M27.status_note: PASS on vanilla RHCOS 9.8+ (OCP 4.22+). Older RHCOS versions still require remediation.

M28.title: USBGuard
M28.notes: USBGuard RPM not available on RHCOS. MC enables service and adds rules but package-usbguard-installed and service-usbguard-enabled always fail.

M30.title: OAuth Configuration
M30.notes: oauth-or-oauthclient-inactivity-timeout passes. oauth-or-oauthclient-token-maxage is a platform-level OAuth config not addressable by MachineConfig.

no-empty-passwords.description: Disable nullok in PAM system-auth and password-auth

sshd-disable-empty-passwords.description: Prevent SSH login with empty passwords

sshd-set-loglevel-info.description: Set SSH logging to INFO level

sysctl-net-core-bpf-jit-harden.description: Harden BPF JIT against spraying attacks

sysctl-kernel-dmesg-restrict.description: Restrict kernel log access to privileged users

configure-network-policies-namespaces.description: Manual: Configure network policies per namespace

secrets-no-environment-variables.description: Manual: Don't use env vars for secrets
